name: Set Touch Links
description: Set the allowed-collision links (touch_links) on a RigidBody state. Use for static bodies that are expected to touch specific robot links.

inputParameters.name: rigid_body_id
inputParameters.description: Id of the rigid body inside the RobotCell.

inputParameters.name: touch_links
inputParameters.description: List of robot link names allowed to collide with the body. Empty list clears the touch_links.

outputParameters.name: cell_state
outputParameters.description: New RobotCellState with the touch_links updated.
